title: Solar Tax Credit Guide
description: Learn about federal and state solar tax credits and how to verify current eligibility.
keyTakeaways: Tax credits can reduce effective solar costs
You usually must own the system
A tax professional should verify your situation
Save signed contracts, paid invoices, and equipment documents before tax season

sections.title: What the Credit Does
sections.content: Solar tax credits may offset a portion of qualifying installation costs. Rules and amounts change, so verify current guidance before relying on any incentive.

sections.title: State and Utility Incentives
sections.content: Some states and utilities offer rebates, SRECs, exemptions, or performance incentives. Availability depends on location and program budget.

sections.title: How to Prepare
sections.content: Keep contracts, invoices, equipment details, and installer documentation for your tax professional.

sections.title: What to Verify Before You Sign
sections.content: Confirm that the quote separates equipment, labor, roofing, battery, and financing costs. Ask which items the installer believes are eligible, then have a tax professional verify because eligibility depends on current rules and your tax situation.

sections.title: Why Incentive Pages Need Updates
sections.content: Federal, state, utility, and SREC-style programs can change when budgets, legislation, or utility tariffs change. Treat any calculator result as a planning estimate until you verify current program documents.

faqs.question: Can leased systems claim homeowner credits?
faqs.answer: Usually no. The system owner typically claims credits, so verify your contract structure.

faqs.question: Can I rely on an installer to calculate my credit?
faqs.answer: Use installer estimates as planning inputs only. A tax professional should confirm eligibility, forms, timing, and carryforward rules for your household.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy solar homeowner resources
IRS residential clean energy credit guidance
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
